questions.question: Describe a technique used to detect errors in software code and explain its benefits.
questions.hint: Code reviews, unit testing, and static analysis are common techniques. Choose one and explain its benefits.

questions.question: What is the primary objective of pair programming, and how does it contribute to software quality?
questions.hint: Pair programming involves two developers working together on the same code. Explain its benefits and how it enhances software quality.

questions.question: Choose a software quality metric (e.g., defect density, test coverage) and explain why it is an important indicator of software quality.
questions.hint: Select a metric and explain its significance and how it relates to software quality.
